description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the microsoft/dotnet:1.0.1-sdk-projectjson Docker image and defines four stages: build, test, deploy, and deploy-docker. Include a global before_script that sets BUILD_DIR to the absolute working directory and NUGET_PACKAGES to $BUILD_DIR/.nuget for all jobs. In the build stage add a build-job that runs 'dotnet restore' then sources ./build-all.sh, caches the .nuget directory with a key of $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME, and publishes artifacts matching all */*/bin, */*/obj and */*/project.lock.json paths. In the test stage add a unittest-job that depends on build-job, runs 'dotnet restore' then sources ./test-all.sh, and uploads the same bin, obj and project.lock.json artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy-job that runs 'dotnet restore' then sources ./publish-all.sh and stores all */*/bin/*/*.nupkg files as artifacts. No explicit rules or services are defined, so all jobs run on default branches.
